description_long: This rickshaw features a traditional, enclosed carriage with a rectangular body and a gently curved roof adorned with a green and gold floral pattern. The sides of the carriage are decorated with ornate red and gold geometric panels, and there are two large wooden wheels attached to either side. The front and rear panels are covered with green slats, likely for ventilation, and the carriage is supported by two long, curved wooden shafts for pulling. The structure appears to be primarily made of wood, with fabric or leather used for the roof and decorative elements. The interior is likely designed to seat one or two passengers, providing shelter and comfort during transit.
description: A decorative, enclosed wooden rickshaw with a green and gold patterned roof, red geometric side panels, and two large wooden wheels. The carriage is supported by long wooden shafts for pulling and features green slatted panels at the front and rear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the green slatted panel, curved shafts, and the rounded roof with floral patterns.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the ornate red and gold geometric panels, large wooden wheel, and the full length of the pulling shafts.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the green slatted panel and the symmetry of the wheels and roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with similar decorative panels and wheel, showing the other side of the pulling shafts.
attribute_passenger_seating_arrangement: One or two forward-facing seats located centrally within the carriage.
attribute_driver_position: front exterior, standing or walking between the shafts
